TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN A MARSHY AREA A FEW MILES SOUTH SOUTHEAST OF HITCHCOCK. MULTIPLE WITNESSES OBSERVED SWIRLING DEBRIS AND A FUNNEL CLOUD OVER THE MARSHY FIELD...INCLUDING ONE WHO CAPTURED VIDEO OF FUNNEL. DAMAGE PATH EXTENDED INTO THE HARBORWALK COMMUNITY WITH AT LEAST 6 GARAGE DOORS DAMAGED OR DESTROYED. A FEW HOMES ALSO HAD MINOR SHINGLE DAMAGE. *** 3 INJ *** WATERSPOUT MOVED ONSHORE AND SEVERELY DAMAGED A GIFT SHOP AT 29TH STREET AND SEAWALL BLVD WITH WINDOWS BLOWN OUT AND HALF OF METAL ROOF REMOVED. WINDOWS OF A PATROL CAR WERE BLOWN OUT IN THE SAME AREA. DAMAGE PATH CONTINUED NORTHWEST ABOUT ONE THIRD A MILE WITH DAMAGE TO SEVERAL STRUCTURES. DAMAGE SUPPORTS LOW END EF1 RATING WITH MAXIMUM WINDS ESTIMATED AT AROUND 90 MPH.

*** 3 INJ *** WATERSPOUT MOVED ONSHORE BETWEEN 33RD AND 29TH STREETS. BLEW WINDOW OUT OF A POLICE CAR AND TOOK THE ROOF OFF A SOUVENIR SHOP ON THE 2900 BLOCK OF SEA WALL BLVD. THREE INJURED FROM EITHER SHATTERED VEHICLE GLASS OR FLYING STRUCTURAL DEBRIS. TWO RESIDENCES ON 29TH STREET RECEIVED SIGNIFICANT STRUCTURAL DAMAGE WITH REPORTS OF ROOF AND WINDOW DAMAGE.
WATERSPOUT MOVED ONSHORE BETWEEN 37TH AND 25TH STREETS. BLEW WINDOW OUT OF POLICE CAR AND TOOK ROOF OFF A BUILDING.
